ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building's location */,
  "number_of_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the building */,
  "structural_integrity" INTEGER /* Structural integrity score of the building */,
  "retrofitted" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the building has been retrofitted */,
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "occupancy_type" TEXT /* Type of occupancy (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "building_status" TEXT /* Current status of the building (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the building record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the building record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_building_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_type_id") REFERENCES building_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the building type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  "design_load" REAL /* Design load for the building type (e.g., maximum weight capacity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "geological_risk_level" TEXT /* Geological risk level of the region (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_regions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_regions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "structural_score" INTEGER /* Structural integrity score from the inspection */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inspection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inspection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the inspector is based */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the inspector (e.g., level 1, level 2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inspector record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inspector record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retrofit_history" (
  "retrofit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retrofit activity */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being retrofitted */,
  "retrofit_date" TEXT /* Date of the retrofitting */,
  "retrofit_type" TEXT /* Type of retrofitting activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the retrofitting */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor performing the retrofitting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the retrofit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the retrofit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retrofit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retrofit_history_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retrofit_history_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the contractor's company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contractor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contractor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the contractor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contractor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contractor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inspector, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the building record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the building record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building with the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_versions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region with the weather data */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on that date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity on that date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation on that date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the weather data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the weather data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geological_data" (
  "geological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region with the geological data */,
  "geological_date" TEXT /* Date of the geological data */,
  "fault_line_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest fault line */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the geological data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the geological data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
